{{Quote|Secret agent Dono to Momship. Hope you enjoying plenty big treasure dump. Plenty good stuff left on big-ship, you bet. Have place-numbers for next big-ship stop. Will transmit in super-secret Squib code. Starting now.|Dono|<ref name="SH" />}}
'''Dono''' was a [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] who lived aboard the [[Imperial Armored Transport]] [[Elusive (transport)|''Elusive'']]. In the [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] of the [[Squib Reclamation Fleet]], Dono was a [[Spy/Legends|secret agent]] who transmitted the ''Elusive''{{'s}} coordinates to the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] so they could follow behind the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] and snatch up the garbage it dumped before it jumped to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. To the ''Elusive''{{'s}} crew, however, the Squib was a mere [[Slavery/Legends|slave]]. Sometime between [[0 ABY/Legends|0]] and [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Dono transmitted the [[Transport/Legends|transport's]] jump coordinates to the Squib fleet after a [[Battle of Dankayo|battle]] with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces in the [[Dankayo system/Legends|Dankayo system]].

==Biography==
[[File:VeryGenericTransport-SH.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Dono served aboard the Imperial Armored Transport ''Elusive''.]]
Although the crew of the [[Imperial Armored Transport]] [[Elusive (transport)|''Elusive'']] considered the [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] Dono to be a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]], the [[Squib Reclamation Fleet]] viewed Dono as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]]. Dono lived and worked aboard the ''Elusive'', which afforded the Squib the opportunity to transmit the [[Starship/Legends|vessel's]] coordinates to the ''[[Thrifty]]'', the Squib [[Momship]] and [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. This allowed the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Scavenger/Legends|scavengers]] to collect the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ship's garbage, which it jettisoned prior to each [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump per Imperial procedure. Dono kept these transmissions secret by sending them via a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]-band signal and by using a [[Language/Legends|language]] known as [[Old High Squibbian]].<ref name="SH" />

At some point between [[0 ABY/Legends|0]] and [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="date">[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']] takes place at an unspecified point after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|destruction]] of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]], which occurs in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', and before the assignment of [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Carlist Rieekan]] to [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]], which occurs in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''The New Essential Chronology''.</ref> Dono was aboard the ''Elusive'' in the [[Dankayo system/Legends|Dankayo system]], where the ship's Imperial crew was [[Battle of Dankayo|attacked]] by a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] operated by a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[operative]]s. As the ''Elusive'' dumped its refuse into [[Realspace/Legends|space]] and jumped to [[Lightspeed/Legends|lightspeed]], Dono dutifully transmitted the coordinates for its next destination to the Squib fleet so that they could reclaim its garbage there.<ref name="SH" />

==Personality and traits==
Like the other members of the Squib fleet, Dono considered the post aboard the ''Elusive'' to be an undercover assignment. The Squib dutifully transmitted the [[Armor/Legends|armored]] [[Transport/Legends|transport's]] coordinates to allow the Squib Reclamation Fleet to shadow it and reclaim its rubbish dumps. Dono spoke at least two languages: Old High Squibbian and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although the secret agent's command of the latter language was inflected as it was for other members of the Squib [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="SH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dono is mentioned in the [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying adventure]] [[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']], written by [[Brad Freeman]] and published by [[West End Games]] in [[1989]] as part of ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. Although Dono does not appear directly in the story, the Squib secret agent is mentioned in conjunction with the message the Squib sends to the spy's compatriots on the ''Thrifty''.<ref name="SH" />

==Appearances==
